title: castilleja hyperborea
intro: Castilleja hyperborea, also known as the mountain Indian paintbrush, is a perennial wildflower native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant contains a unique combination of iridoid glycosides and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Castilleja hyperborea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Castilleja hyperborea is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to address various health concerns.
